title: Regsvr32 Remote COM Object Execution (Squiblydoo)
description: Detects regsvr32.exe loading remote COM objects or DLLs via HTTP/HTTPS/SMB — the 'Squiblydoo' technique. Regsvr32 is a signed binary that bypasses AppLocker and can execute arbitrary scriptlets or DLLs without writing to disk. Used extensively in phishing and post-exploitation chains.
falsepositives: Legitimate COM DLL registration from network shares in enterprise environments
